name: snarl-sopi-backend
description: Snarl & Sopi backend v4.95 — signup onboarding: POST /operators/provision (X-Provision-Key auth) creates an operator from the leasing Zap, links it to its Payday customer, and emails the onboarding invite via the existing SendGrid invite flow. Idempotent on kennitala/customer id. Set PROVISION_KEY in Railway to enable.
